shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "downshift useSelect type-ahead character key space search buffer highlighted item" --json --top-k 5'
/bin/bash -lc 'git status --short && rg -n "type.?ahead|character|search" src test* packages 2>/dev/null | head -200'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,180p' src/hooks/useSelect/index.js; sed -n '1,120p' src/hooks/useSelect/reducer.js; sed -n '1,180p' src/hooks/useSelect/utils.ts; sed -n '1,100p' src/hooks/useSelect/types.ts; sed -n '1,130p' src/hooks/useSelect/__tests__/utils.test.ts"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '165,360p' src/hooks/useSelect/index.js; sed -n '1,180p' src/hooks/useSelect/__tests__/getToggleButtonProps.test.js; sed -n '1,140p' src/hooks/useSelect/testUtils.js; rg -n \"ToggleButtonKeyDownSpace|Space\" src/hooks/useSelect/index.js src/hooks/useSelect/__tests__/getToggleButtonProps.test.js"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '360,510p' src/hooks/useSelect/index.js; sed -n '1,100p' src/hooks/useSelect/testUtils.js; sed -n '780,830p' src/hooks/useSelect/README.md; git diff -- package.json"
/bin/bash -lc 'rg -n "function isAcceptedCharacterKey|isAcceptedCharacterKey" src && rg -n "const items|export const items" src/hooks/useSelect/testUtils.js src/hooks/testUtils.js src | head -30'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '110,145p' src/hooks/utils.js; sed -n '1,35p' src/hooks/testUtils.js; sed -n '1,120p' src/hooks/useSelect/stateChangeTypes.js; sed -n '1,80p' src/hooks/useSelect/__tests__/getToggleButtonProps.test.js | tail -20"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"function keyDownOnToggleButton\" -A18 src/hooks/useSelect/testUtils.js; sed -n '520,590p' src/hooks/useSelect/__tests__/getToggleButtonProps.test.js; git diff -- src/hooks/useSelect/index.js src/hooks/useSelect/utils.ts"

/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git status --short && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/hooks/useSelect/index.js src/hooks/useSelect/utils.ts src/hooks/useSelect/__tests__/getToggleButtonProps.test.js'
